content.en:
"Ye Tian, we will break out a large-scale war with Wuji Heavenly Palace again in the near future, and your existence, Wuji Heavenly Palace is not yet known. Moreover, you are not a sevenfold supreme realm, and even if the means of the Infinite Heavenly Palace perceive you, they will only think that you are an ordinary threefold supreme realm. If you infiltrate a Infinite Heavenly Palace residence, you can definitely kill many of them to the Dao Realm. "

Taisu Palace Master said.

Every Sevenfold Dao Realm is locked by the Infinite Heavenly Palace, and once there is an action, it will be known as soon as possible.

At the beginning, Bai Ye Tianzun had just broken through to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and with the cover of the secret treasure of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, this made the Taisu Palace not locked.

But now, Taisu Palace has also locked Bai Ye Tianzun, while Wuji Heavenly Palace has definitely not locked Ye Tian yet.

In the following days, Ye Tian's copy body was practicing in Taisu Palace.

Time passes slowly.

this day.

A great war broke out between the many Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms of the Taisu Palace and the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, affecting many territories.

And Ye Tian was also preparing to attack a station in the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

This station usually has a sevenfold supreme Dao realm stationed, but now, there are only six sixth-fold supreme Dao realms and dozens of fifth-fold supreme Dao realms and some ordinary supreme Dao realms.

In the absence of the invasion of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, this station was naturally very safe.

Of course.

Ye Tian had the strength to kill this group of supreme realms.

So, he came here alone.

"The big array of this station is amazing, if I attack it directly, they open the big array, and I won't be easy to break it!" Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, he planned to copy a Supreme Dao Realm of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, blend into it, destroy the formation base, and then kill into this station.

Soon.

He found an opportunity to kill a Triple Dao Realm in an instant, and then copied the opponent's body and entered the station as the opponent.

After some inspection, the replica body was naturally not stopped, and directly entered the station.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian looked for an opportunity and came to a formation base.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian used this replica body to attack this formation base, and used the seventh sequence of the Extreme Dao rules to instantly kill a Quadruple Supreme Dao Realm, and then beat this formation base to cracks, making this formation base lose its due effect.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian's true body copied his body and directly attacked this station.

"There is an invasion of the Dao Realm!"

One of the Supreme Dao Realms of the Wuji Heavenly Palace reacted, and those Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms also came out.

When they found Ye Tian, they were dumbfounded.

The high-level officials of the Wuji Heavenly Palace all knew about Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian was the Supreme Dao Realm who was personally killed by the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Although the Wuji Heavenly Palace did not kill Ye Tian, it also used the Wuji Prison Heavenly Array to trap Ye Tian's body in the Origin Realm!

But now, Ye Tian actually appeared here.

"It's just a triple to the Dao realm, kill!"

These Sixfold Dao Realms all shot out in unison, wanting to kill Ye Tian.

However.

When Ye Tian showed the seventh sequence of the Dao rules and displayed the seventh sequence of the Dao supernatural powers, they were dumbfounded.

Rumble!

A Sixfold Dao Realm was directly killed by Ye Tian's shot.

The other Dao Realm attacks fell on him, and they only repelled them, but they didn't hurt him.

Thundered!!!!

Fight and kill.

These sixfold supreme Dao realms quickly fell into Ye Tian's hands one by one, while the other supreme Dao realms wanted to escape, but they were all caught up by Ye Tian one by one.

Countless Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao rules crossed the void and killed a Famous Dao Realm.

Not long after, all the supreme realms of this station were destroyed.

Then.

Ye Tian took away their treasure resources, and also took away the treasure house here.

He then came to a portal outside of the station.

"This is the Fourth Strange Land of the Infinite Domain!"

Ye Tian wanted to enter the fourth strange place to take a look, but if he thought about it carefully, he still had to go in later.

Now, even if he enters the fourth and seventh places, he can't kill the most strange things inside!

The supreme Dao strange things that contained the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao were comparable to the sevenfold supreme dao realm at the weakest, and they were not something he could deal with.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here.

At this time, the Wuji Heavenly Palace naturally learned the news of the destruction of this station, and one by one the Sevenfold Dao Realm was furious.

After some time, the battle between Taisu Palace and Wuji Heavenly Palace's Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm ended and only suspended the battle at the cost of some serious injuries to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

The faces of the Six Crying Heavenly Venerable and the other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms were gloomy.

"So many fivefold supreme Dao realms, sixfold supreme Dao realms, and the blessing of the Great Array, but they were destroyed by the Taisu Palace!"

Then.

The Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Hanging River Heavenly Venerable who was in charge of that station said, "Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable, I have received a summons from one of the fallen Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm Venerables, and the person who made the attack is Ye Tian!"

"Ye Tian?"

Bai Ye Tianzun was shocked, a little incredulous, "How could it be Ye Tian, I personally arranged the Wuji Prison Heavenly Array in that Origin Realm, and Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor killed all Ye Tian's other clones, leaving only the main body." Unless his body reaches the sevenfold Dao realm combat power, he can't break the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array at all! But Ye Tiancai's second to the Dao realm, even if he cultivates to break through to the Triple Dao realm, he is on the path of the strongest to the Dao, and he has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Dao, and at most he has the invincible strength of the sixth-fold Dao realm, he still can't break the Infinite Prison Heaven Array!"

Hanging River Tianzun said: "Bai Ye Tianzun, it's useless to say this, Ye Tian has indeed come out now!First of all, he has indeed broken through to the Triple Supreme Dao Realm, and this is the only way to kill so many Supreme Dao Realms!"

Liuqi Tianzun hurriedly said: "Now is not the time to make noise, the Ye Tian who appears now may not necessarily be his body, even if he pays a heavy price to kill, it is meaningless." The Infinite Heavenly Emperor didn't kill him, and it would be difficult for us to kill him. Ignore Ye Tian for now, and use the Taixu Tianxun Mirror to lock Ye Tian's traces, in this way, it will not be easy for him to make a move!"

"That's the only way to do it!"

The other Sevenfold Dao Realms nodded their heads.

......

In the following years, under the arrangement of Taisu Palace, Ye Tian attacked the station of Wuji Heavenly Palace many times, although the operation failed, he also killed a lot of Supreme Dao Realm.

It can be said that with Ye Tian's assistance, Taisu Palace has occupied a slight advantage.

However, it was still a little difficult to completely bring down the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Before I knew it, several more solstice years had passed.

At this time, many of the territories of the Infinite Domain were completely chaotic, and many of them were smashed to pieces.

At this time, Taisu Palace was also a little anxious.

After all, if they continued to consume, they might not be able to consume the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

However, on this day, the Taisu Palace Lord came to Ye Tian to discuss an important matter with him.

"Ye Tian, you should be able to refine a clone very quickly, and the cost is not too big, right?"

Taisu Palace Master said.

"Taisu Palace Master, what do you want me to do?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Taisu Palace Lord smiled and said, "I said that if I have a way to enter the strange land and kill the Supreme Dao Strange Thing that contains the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, can I send the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item to the Taisu Palace?"

"What!"

Ye Tian was shocked and moved.
